column2: Application Binary Interface — the calling and layout conventions that binaries must agree on.
Analog-to-Digital Converter.
ARM Architecture Procedure Call Standard — the ARM ABI (first four int args in r0-r3, result in r0).
Bipolar Junction Transistor.
Block Started by Symbol — the zero-initialised data section, reserved in RAM and zeroed at boot.
Core-Coupled Memory — fast RAM wired to the core but not on the DMA bus matrix.
Complex Instruction Set Computer.
Cortex Microcontroller Software Interface Standard.
Clock Phase / Clock Polarity — the two SPI mode bits.
Debug Access Port — the gateway an external probe uses to reach the chip's buses.
Direct Memory Access — moving data to/from RAM without the CPU copying each byte.
Data Watchpoint and Trace unit — watches data addresses (watchpoints) and holds cycle counters.
Executable and Linkable Format — the structured object/executable file format.
Electromagnetic Interference.
Flash Patch and Breakpoint unit — provides hardware breakpoints via address comparators.
Floating-Point Unit.
General-Purpose Input/Output.
Hardware Abstraction Layer — ST's high-level, portable driver library.
Inter-Integrated Circuit bus — a two-wire, open-drain, addressed serial bus.
Interrupt Service Routine.
Instrumentation Trace Macrocell — streams printf-style trace out the SWO pin.
Joint Test Action Group — the classic 4-5-wire debug interface.
Low-Layer driver library — thin, register-near, mostly static inline wrappers.
Load Memory Address (where bytes sit in the image) / Virtual or run Memory Address (where they run).
Microcontroller / Microprocessor (MPU also = Memory-Protection Unit).
Micro-Electro-Mechanical System.
Motor Industry Software Reliability Association — a defensive C coding standard.
Memory-Management Unit — provides virtual addresses and hardware isolation (absent on most MCUs).
Metal-Oxide-Semiconductor Field-Effect Transistor.
Non-Maskable Interrupt — cannot be disabled, reserved for critical events.
Negative Temperature Coefficient thermistor — resistance falls as temperature rises.
Nested Vectored Interrupt Controller — the Cortex-M interrupt controller.
Pulse-Width Modulation.
Reduced Instruction Set Computer.
Real-Time Operating System.
Serial Peripheral Interface — a fast, full-duplex, chip-select-selected serial bus.
Static Random-Access Memory.
Serial Wire Debug (2-wire debug interface) / Serial Wire Output (trace pin).
